title: Try / Catch 🪂
description: Deploy a safety parachute to catch the crash before it hits the ground.

slides.title: The Safety Net 🕸️
slides.content:
# Try this... Catch that

To stop an Exception from destroying your app, we wrap dangerous code inside a `try` block.

If the code inside `try {}` blows up, execution immediately jumps down into the `catch {}` block.

Instead of crashing the app, YOU get to decide what happens next! (Like showing an error popup to the user).

slides.title: Writing the Net 🕸️

quizData.question: If the code inside the `try` block succeeds perfectly, what happens to the `catch` block?

options.text: It is completely ignored and skipped.

quizData.explanation: The catch block ONLY triggers if a catastrophic error occurs in the try block.

slides.title: Targeting Specific Errors 🎯

quizData.explanation: You use 'on SpecificException' to route specific errors differently.

slides.title: See it in Action
slides.content: Watch the execution jump instantly from line 4 down to the catch block!
